summary.why: The neutral theme still used repeated editorial scaffolding, side-tab accents, one-off color literals, low-contrast dark metadata, and undersized mobile navigation targets.
summary.how: Applied the Impeccable polish workflow: removed decorative eyebrows and numbered markers, consolidated theme-aware text tokens, simplified accents, raised contrast, and completed responsive interaction states while preserving the established type and layout.

notes: Impeccable detector findings for em-dash overuse and numbered sequences in generated historical artifacts were intentionally left unchanged; they describe content, dates, and changelog versions rather than theme chrome.
